hero.subheading: Full-cycle engineering, EPC support, operation and maintenance, SCADA and digital solutions for critical gas transmission and energy infrastructure.

about.body1: Comita Technics DOO Beograd is a full-cycle, highly qualified engineering and maintenance company. We have designed, built, and today maintain critical gas transmission facilities in the region.
about.body2: We operate under transparent SLAs, apply predictive maintenance methods and digital diagnostics, and ensure process control through SCADA and advanced telemetry.
about.missionText: To design, construct, and service critical energy infrastructure, delivering predictable reliability of supply through strict HSE standards, digital diagnostics, and commitment to SLAs.
principles: Safety First — zero tolerance for incidents.
Trusted Engineering — solutions built to endure.
Predictive Maintenance — from reactive to proactive.
Partnership and Transparency — SLAs and open reporting.
about.licensesIssuedBy: Issued by the Ministry of Construction, Transport and Infrastructure of the Republic of Serbia

I030G1.title: Civil & Structural Works
I030G1.description: Construction of building structures for oil and gas processing facilities built outside of exploitation fields, with prior approval from the Ministry responsible for mineral resources exploitation, and maintenance of exploitation facilities.

I031M1.title: Mechanical & Gas Installations
I031M1.description: Construction of thermotechnical, thermoenergetic, process and gas installations of oil and gas pipelines and product pipelines, gas networks with operating pressure exceeding 16 bar, stationary and floating bunkering stations for supplying ships and floating vessels with liquid fuel capacity exceeding 500 m², oil storage facilities, liquid natural gas and petroleum derivatives storage facilities.

services.heading: Complete Energy Solutions
services.subheading: From concept to operation — full-cycle solutions for the energy future.

epc.title: EPC Full Cycle
epc.description: Complete turnkey projects from design through commissioning. Compressor stations, metering units, dispatch centers.

renewable.title: Renewable Energy
renewable.description: Integration of solar and wind power units into existing infrastructure. Hybrid energy complexes and balance management.

scada.title: SCADA & Digital
scada.description: Advanced telemetry, process control, and digital diagnostics. World-class dispatch center integration and cybersecurity.

consulting.title: Consulting & Engineering
consulting.description: Project feasibility studies, system audits, technical regulations, and full licensing and certification support.

projects.heading: Built to last for decades
projects.subheading: Comita Technics DOO Beograd was founded through the strategic collaboration of industry-leading experts with decades of experience in the execution of large-scale energy projects. Our team combines specialized knowledge and proven expertise to support the development of critical energy infrastructure at every stage of the project lifecycle, delivering integrated solutions that meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and performance.

project3.title: MCC Novi Sad
project3.subtitle: Main Control Center
project3.note: Ergonomic design — built for critical infrastructure operations

operationsMaintenance.heading: Continuous Reliability in Critical Systems
operationsMaintenance.subheading: Long-term operation and maintenance programs with preventive diagnostics, rapid interventions, and disciplined SLA delivery across gas infrastructure.
operationsMaintenance.text0: Comprehensive maintenance and repair of the Main gas pipeline (interconnector) "border of Bulgaria - border of Hungary" from 2025
operationsMaintenance.text1: A set of works related to the expansion of the existing underground gas storage facilities "Banatski Dvor" from 2025

team.heading: The Team That Builds
team.subheading: 60+ specialists 💠 Strong safety performance 💠 High availability of maintained systems 💠 SLA-based maintenance and reporting

management.title: 28 · Management & Administrative Staff
management.text: Project management, finance, O&M planning, procurement, QA/QC, HSE — ensuring predictable operations.

engineers.title: 18 · Lead Engineers — 24/7
engineers.text: Unique energy infrastructure expertise providing round-the-clock support and on-call response.

technicians.title: 16 · Field Technicians
technicians.text: Electricians, mechanics, and technicians — the hands that keep the system running continuously.

team.multilingual: Multilingual team — direct communication with clients and partners.

partners.heading: Trusted by Major Industry Stakeholders
partners.subheading: Global-scale projects are only possible through strategic partnerships with leading industry companies.
partners.quote: "Together, we build infrastructure that lasts for decades."

sponsorships.body: Comita Technics DOO Beograd believes that technical excellence and social responsibility go hand in hand. Through our sponsorship and donation program, we support education, cultural heritage, environmental protection, and community development across the region.

heritage.title: Cultural Heritage
heritage.text: Restoring sacred sites and historical landmarks

contact.body: We are always open to discussing new projects, engineering challenges, and partnership opportunities across the region and beyond.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

home.title: Comita Technics DOO Beograd | EPC, O&M and Energy Infrastructure
home.description: Comita Technics DOO Beograd delivers EPC, operations and maintenance, SCADA, and engineering services for energy infrastructure across Serbia and the wider region.

sponsorships.title: Sponsorships and Donations | Comita Technics DOO Beograd
sponsorships.description: Learn about the Comita Technics DOO Beograd sponsorship and donation program, application process, required documents, and community impact priorities.

sponsorshipsPage.heroBody: Comita Technics DOO Beograd is committed to responsible business practices and contributing to the sustainable development of the communities in which we operate.
sponsorshipsPage.quote: We are committed to supporting initiatives that create lasting value - for the communities where we live and work, and for the society we are part of.
sponsorshipsPage.content1: Comita Technics DOO Beograd recognizes that our work shapes not just energy systems - but the communities around them. Our sponsorship and donation activities are focused on initiatives that deliver measurable benefits, encourage professional development, improve quality of life, and contribute to the advancement of local communities.
sponsorshipsPage.content2: We carefully evaluate all requests to ensure alignment with our corporate values and social responsibility objectives. Priority is given to projects with clear, long-term positive impact on the communities where we operate.
sponsorshipsPage.budgetNote: (required only if the requested support involves monetary funds)
sponsorshipsPage.docsNote: (required if more than one partner is involved in the project)
sponsorshipsPage.emailIntro: All requests and inquiries should be submitted to:
sponsorshipsPage.eligibleText: Eligible recipients include educational institutions, non-governmental organizations, professional and scientific associations, local community organizations, humanitarian and charitable institutions, and cultural organizations. Applications from individuals are generally not considered unless submitted through a registered organization.
sponsorshipsPage.notifiedText: All applicants will be notified of the decision following our evaluation process. If the request is approved, the appropriate Sponsorship or Donation Agreement will be concluded with Comita Technics DOO Beograd.
sponsorshipsPage.contactBody: We review all inquiries and respond as soon as possible.
